missables: Al Bhed Primer Vol. XV — ground item near O'aka mid-woods; easy to walk past.
Kimahri Lancet — use Lancet on a Chimera here to learn Aqua Breath (primary opportunity).
Clasko / Friend Sphere — suggest chocobo breeding on this visit to unlock a later reward.
sgTip: Get Haste on Tidus before the Crawler fight in Lake Macalania — it transforms the fight. Use Lv. 1 Key Spheres to unlock the node if needed.

subLocations.name: Macalania Woods
subLocations.prose: The woods maze branches frequently — there's a hidden Sleepy Cait Sith behind a tree trunk early on the left. O'aka is set up on the main Lake Road path; the butterfly chase mini-games in the clearing sections are optional but reward a useful item for completing both. Primer XVI is found later with Clasko near the Lake Macalania Travel Agency — the woods themselves just have chests and field encounters. Ice Flan and Snow Flan enemies throughout these woods absorb Ice — use Fire spells (Lulu's Fira) or Tidus's physical attacks instead; Wasp enemies can inflict Poison, so keep Antidotes stocked.

items.name: Sleepy Cait Sith
items.note: Hidden behind tree trunk in middle of south S-bend

items.name: 2,000 Gil
items.note: Chest near north exit of south area

items.name: Phoenix Down
items.note: Chest hidden behind tree before spiral down (central area)

items.name: Remedy
items.note: Chest hidden behind tree on west side (north area)

subLocations.name: Butterfly Mini-Game
subLocations.prose: Approach the color-shifting butterfly to begin the chase. Touch all 7 blue butterflies before time runs out — avoid red butterflies as they trigger enemy battles. Leave and return to reset if you fail. A second area unlocks after clearing the first. Return after Spherimorph for harder variants with better prizes; the Saturn Sigil reward requires coming back post-airship.

items.name: MP Sphere
items.note: Butterfly chase Area 1 reward (7 blue butterflies)

subLocations.name: Lake Macalania Agency Front
subLocations.prose: After Spherimorph, the party reaches the Travel Agency outside Lake Macalania. Clasko is here — suggest chocobo breeding to him now to unlock a Friend Sphere reward later. A chest with 4,000 Gil sits nearby but Clasko blocks it until events progress. Al Bhed Primer Vol. XVI is on the ground by the agency entrance. Save before heading inside — the road ahead leads straight to another boss fight with no turning back.

items.name: 4,000 Gil
items.note: Chest at Agency front — Clasko blocks it initially; obtainable after he moves

subLocations.name: Spherimorph (Boss Drop)
subLocations.prose: After defeating Spherimorph, it drops Jecht's Sphere — a story item that triggers Auron's first Overdrive: Shooting Star. Equip non-elemental weapons before the fight to avoid accidentally healing it.

items.name: Jecht's Sphere (Macalania Woods)
items.note: Dropped by Spherimorph — unlocks Auron's Overdrive: Shooting Star

bosses.strategy: Spherimorph counterattacks every spell you cast with the same element it currently embodies — hitting its weakness shifts it to a new random element. Watch what spell it casts on its turn: that spell reveals its current element, meaning you need to hit the opposite. For example, if it casts Fire, attack with Blizzard; if it casts Water, attack with Thunder. Equip non-elemental weapons on your physical fighters to avoid accidentally healing it — their job is just to deal damage and bait out its counterattack spell to identify the current element. Each time you hit the weakness it shifts, so don't expect to chain the same element twice.
